const analysis = $('Process & Analyse Data').first().json; const aiText = $('AI Health Insights').first().json.message?.content || $('AI Health Insights').first().json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "AI insights unavailable."; const { recentRows = [], metricStats = [], anomalies = [], trends = [], totalRows = 0, generatedAt = new Date().toISOString() } = analysis; // ---------- HELPERS ---------- const statusColor = s => s === 'high' ? '#dc2626' : s === 'low' ? '#f59e0b' : '#16a34a'; const formatDate = d => new Date(d).toLocaleString(); // ---------- KPI ---------- const normalCount = metricStats.filter(m => m.status === 'normal').length; const abnormalCount = anomalies.length; // ---------- AI ---------- const aiHtml = aiText.split('\n').map(i => `
  • ${i}
    • `).join(""); // ---------- METRIC CARDS ---------- const cards = metricStats.map(m => `
    ${m.label}
    ${m.latest || m.avg} ${m.unit || ""}
    Avg: ${m.avg}
    Min: ${m.min} | Max: ${m.max}
    `).join(""); // ---------- ANOMALIES ---------- const anomalyHtml = anomalies.length ? anomalies.map(a => ` ${a.date} ${a.time} ${a.description} ${a.value} `).join("") : `No anomalies`; // ---------- TRENDS ---------- const trendHtml = trends.length ? trends.map(t => `
  • ${t.label}: ${t.direction} (${t.changePct}%)
    • `).join("") : "
  • All metrics stable
    • "; // ---------- RECENT ---------- const recentHtml = recentRows.slice(0,10).map(r => ` ${r.date} ${r.time} ${r.description} ${r.rawValue} `).join(""); // ---------- FINAL HTML ---------- const html = `

    Patient Health Dashboard

    ${formatDate(generatedAt)}

    ${totalRows}

    Total Records

    ${normalCount}

    Normal

    ${abnormalCount}

    Anomalies

    Metrics Overview

    ${cards}

    AI Insights

      ${aiHtml}

    Trend Analysis

      ${trendHtml}

    Anomalies

    ${anomalyHtml}
    DateMetricValue

    Recent Data

    ${recentHtml}
    DateTimeMetricValue
    `; return [{ json: { html, subject: "Professional Health Report" } }];
